title: Spear De Lis
description: This resource pack gives spears a more French design.
body:
# SPEAR DE LIS
this resource pack replaces the new spear's heads with elegant fleur-de-lis designs for a refined, royal (and French) look.
# CHANGES:
- Wooden Spear (inventory and handheld)
- Stone Spear (inventory and handheld)
- Copper Spear (inventory and handheld)
- Iron Spear (inventory and handheld)
- Golden Spear (inventory and handheld)
- Diamond Spear (inventory and handheld)
- Netherite Spear (inventory and handheld)

![Fleur with an Iron Spear (De Lis)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0397e545ac10d1497ce16d88162e9fda3bdc0dfb.png)
